creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Try to build it it fails with error message:
rspamd-1.3.5 depends on shared library: libhs.so - not found

For a complete log, please see here:
https://pkg.fechner.net/data/110amd64-default/2016-10-21_11h23m35s/logs/errors/rspamd-1.3.5.log

Build fails for FreeBSD 10.3 and 11.0.
